title: Products
subtitle: Define and manage your product catalog
skuHelp: SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) is a unique code you use to identify this product. Use your internal code, supplier code, or any format that works for your team.
inventoryProfileDesc: Choose how you want to track this product
inventoryProfileHelp: The profile determines how this product is tracked, what data is collected during movements, and how the widget interface looks. You can't change this after creation.
formulaHelp: Formulas calculate quantity from dimensions. Use variables like length, width, height. Example: length * width for area calculation.
initialStockHelp: Optionally set a starting quantity. You can always add stock later through movements.
destinationLocationHelp: Where initial stock will be placed. If not selected, the first available warehouse is used.
trackingPresetHelp: Assigning a tracking preset overrides the default engine settings from this product's profile. The widget and movement forms will use the preset's configuration instead.
noCompatiblePresets: No compatible presets for this engine type
basicInfoDesc: Core identifiers for this product model.
descriptionPlaceholder: Optional description of this product model
formulaHelperText: Dimensional formula used to compute stock from measurements.
initialStockDesc: Optionally set starting inventory. A stock movement will be created automatically.
initialQuantityHelp: Leave empty or 0 to skip initial stock.
loadErrorDesc: Could not fetch product models. Please try again.
deleteModelConfirm: Are you sure? This will fail if there is active inventory for this model.
profileLocked: Profile cannot be changed after creation.
batchDataFieldsDesc: Batch data fields (like Expiry, Supplier) are configured in the product's engine config. Edit them in Tracking Presets settings.
inventoryAlertsDesc: Configure thresholds that trigger low-stock warnings.
minThresholdHelp: When stock falls below this level, the product will be flagged as Low Stock.
trackingPresetDesc: Override default profile engine settings with a reusable preset.
presetNoneDesc: Product uses its profile's default engine settings
noPresetsForEngine: No presets available for engine type "{{engine}}". Create one in Settings → Tracking Presets.
usingDefaultsFull: Using default profile settings. Assign a preset to customize engine behavior.
kitConfigDesc: Define components if this product is a Kit or Assembly. Leave empty for standard products.
noComponents: No components defined. Click below to add one.
noMovements: No movements recorded for this product.
deleteProductConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

poly.title: Product Instances
poly.subtitle: Manage active inventory units and their calculators
poly.emptyDesc: Create your first instance to start tracking stock and calculators.
poly.loadErrorDesc: Could not fetch product instances. Please try again.
poly.deleteInstanceConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this product instance?
poly.inheritHelp: This instance will inherit the calculator logic defined in the model.
poly.configAfterCreate: Custom engine settings and initial stock can be configured after creation.
poly.modelLocked: Product model cannot be changed after creation.
poly.engineLocked: Engine type is determined by the product model.
poly.noMovements7Day: No movements in the last 7 days
poly.manageItemsHint: Use the "{{tab}}" tab to manage items.
poly.manageBatchesHint: Use the "{{tab}}" tab to manage batches.
poly.noBatchesItems: This product profile ({{engine}}) does not use Batches or Items.

profileWizard.howToTrack: How do you want to track this product?
profileWizard.byQuantityDesc: Count items as a total number. Best for bulk goods, office supplies, raw materials.
profileWizard.byBatchDesc: Track groups of items with lot numbers, expiry dates, or batch codes. Best for food, chemicals, pharmaceuticals.
profileWizard.individuallyDesc: Track each unit with a unique serial number or identifier. Best for equipment, electronics, tools.
profileWizard.unitConversion: Convert between units (e.g., liters to bottles)
profileWizard.assembled: This is assembled from other products
profileWizard.iKnowMyProfile: I already know my profile type
profileWizard.dropdownHelp: The profile determines tracking mode, engine behavior, and widget input type.

profiles.batchTrackedDesc: Track by lot number and batch
profiles.serializedDesc: Track individual units by serial number

emptyState.title: No product models yet
emptyState.description: Create your first product model to start tracking inventory.
emptyState.simpleCountHelp: Simple Count — track items by quantity (bolts, office supplies)
emptyState.batchTrackedHelp: Batch Tracked — track groups with lot numbers (chemicals, food batches)
emptyState.serializedHelp: Serialized — track individual units by serial number (laptops, tools)

hint: Products define what you track. Each product has an inventory profile that determines how it's counted and managed.
